requirement_topic.en: Conformity Marking — Azerbaijan National Mark vs. CE / EAC (Non-EAEU)
requirement_topic.zh: 合规标志——阿塞拜疆国家标志与CE/EAC对比（非EAEU）
requirement_topic.zht: 合規標誌——亞塞拜然國家標誌與CE/EAC對比（非EAEU）

summary.en: Azerbaijan does NOT require CE marking (EU) or the EAC conformity mark (EAEU Eurasian Conformity mark). Azerbaijan is not a member of the EAEU, so the EAC mark is not a valid market-access mark for Azerbaijan. Azerbaijan's national conformity marking system is based on a national conformity certificate (sertifikat sootvetstviya) or declaration of conformity issued by an AZSTAND-recognised body. The physical mark or certificate reference appearing on the product or accompanying documentation reflects the national certification issued under the AZSTAND regime. There is no single, universally mandated pictographic conformity mark equivalent to CE or EAC for the Azerbaijan market — the conformity certificate number on the label and accompanying documentation is the primary evidence of conformity. Exporters should confirm with AZSTAND or the local importer whether a national conformity mark symbol is required on packaging for the specific product category.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆不要求CE标志（欧盟）或EAC合规标志（EAEU欧亚合格标志）。阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员，EAC标志对阿塞拜疆市场无效。阿塞拜疆的国家合规标志体系基于AZSTAND认可机构出具的国家合格证书（sertifikat sootvetstviya）或符合性声明。产品或随附文件上的实体标志或证书参考号反映AZSTAND体系下颁发的国家认证。阿塞拜疆市场没有等同于CE或EAC的统一强制图形合规标志——标签上及随附文件中的合格证书编号是合规的主要证明。出口商应向AZSTAND或当地进口商确认特定产品类别的包装上是否须印制国家合规标志符号。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然不要求CE標誌（歐盟）或EAC合規標誌（EAEU歐亞合格標誌）。亞塞拜然非EAEU成員，EAC標誌對亞塞拜然市場無效。亞塞拜然的國家合規標誌體系基於AZSTAND認可機構出具的國家合格證書（sertifikat sootvetstviya）或符合性聲明。產品或隨附文件上的實體標誌或證書參考號反映AZSTAND體系下頒發的國家認證。亞塞拜然市場沒有等同於CE或EAC的統一強制圖形合規標誌——標籤上及隨附文件中的合格證書編號是合規的主要證明。出口商應向AZSTAND或當地進口商確認特定產品類別的包裝上是否須印製國家合規標誌符號。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND national conformity certification system — national conformity certificate (sertifikat sootvetstviya) or declaration of conformity
Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member — EAC mark (EAEU Eurasian Conformity) does not apply
CE marking (EU Regulation 2016/425) — does not apply to Azerbaijan market

summary.en: Chinese industrial respirators (GB 2626-2019) bear the CCC mark (China Compulsory Certification mark, the double-C logo) as the domestic mandatory conformity mark, administered by CNCA. The CCC mark is visible on the product and packaging. Medical-protective masks (GB 19083) carry the NMPA registration approval number on the label rather than a separate pictographic mark. Neither the CCC mark nor NMPA registration number grants any market access in Azerbaijan — they are China-only marks.
summary.zh: 依据GB 2626-2019的中国工业呼吸器须标有CCC标志（中国强制认证标志，双C徽标），由国家认监委（CNCA）管理，作为国内强制合规标志显示于产品及包装上。医用防护口罩（GB 19083）在标签上标注国家药品监督管理局注册批准编号，而非独立图形标志。CCC标志及NMPA注册编号均不授予阿塞拜疆的任何市场准入资格——这些仅为中国国内标志。
summary.zht: 依據GB 2626-2019的中國工業呼吸器須標有CCC標誌（中國強制認證標誌，雙C徽標），由國家認監委（CNCA）管理，作為國內強制合規標誌顯示於產品及包裝上。醫用防護口罩（GB 19083）在標籤上標注國家藥品監督管理局注冊批准編號，而非獨立圖形標誌。CCC標誌及NMPA注冊編號均不授予亞塞拜然的任何市場准入資格——這些僅為中國國內標誌。

standards_or_laws: CCC mark (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, domestic China market only
GB 2626-2019 — marking provisions for KN95 non-powered particle respirators
NMPA registration approval number — medical-protective masks (GB 19083), domestic China market only

gap.en: The CCC mark and NMPA number are valid only in China. For Azerbaijan: (1) CE marking is not required and confers no benefit; (2) EAC marking is not valid — Azerbaijan is outside the EAEU; (3) The primary evidence of conformity for the Azerbaijan market is the national conformity certificate issued by an AZSTAND-recognised body; (4) Exporters should confirm with AZSTAND or the importer whether a national marking symbol must appear physically on the product or packaging for respiratory PPE; (5) Do not affix the CE or EAC mark to products intended solely for the Azerbaijan market — doing so may be misleading to customs authorities.
gap.zh: CCC标志及NMPA编号仅在中国有效。对于阿塞拜疆：（1）不要求CE标志，亦无相应效力；（2）EAC标志无效——阿塞拜疆不在EAEU范围内；（3）阿塞拜疆市场合规的主要证明是AZSTAND认可机构颁发的国家合格证书；（4）出口商应向AZSTAND或进口商确认呼吸PPE的产品或包装上是否须印制国家标志符号；（5）不得在仅面向阿塞拜疆市场的产品上标注CE或EAC标志——此举可能对海关机关造成误导。
gap.zht: CCC標誌及NMPA編號僅在中國有效。對於亞塞拜然：（1）不要求CE標誌，亦無相應效力；（2）EAC標誌無效——亞塞拜然不在EAEU範圍內；（3）亞塞拜然市場合規的主要證明是AZSTAND認可機構頒發的國家合格證書；（4）出口商應向AZSTAND或進口商確認呼吸PPE的產品或包裝上是否須印製國家標誌符號；（5）不得在僅面向亞塞拜然市場的產品上標注CE或EAC標誌——此舉可能對海關機關造成誤導。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — conformity certification number on label/documentation required; physical national conformity mark on product/packaging — confirm requirement with AZSTAND for specific product category; CE and EAC marks do not apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC mark on product/packaging for GB 2626-2019 industrial respirators; NMPA registration number on label for GB 19083 medical-protective masks

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE and EAC marks do NOT apply to the Azerbaijan market. The national conformity certificate number (AZSTAND regime) is the primary conformity evidence. Exporters must NOT affix CE or EAC marks to products destined solely for Azerbaijan. Confirm whether a physical national conformity symbol is required on packaging for respiratory PPE with AZSTAND or the local importer. Verified: false.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE和EAC标志不适用于阿塞拜疆市场。国家合格证书编号（AZSTAND体系）是主要合规证明。出口商不得在仅面向阿塞拜疆的产品上标注CE或EAC标志。请向AZSTAND或当地进口商确认呼吸PPE包装上是否须印制国家合规标志。已核验：否。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE和EAC標誌不適用於亞塞拜然市場。國家合格證書編號（AZSTAND體系）是主要合規證明。出口商不得在僅面向亞塞拜然的產品上標注CE或EAC標誌。請向AZSTAND或當地進口商確認呼吸PPE包裝上是否須印製國家合規標誌。已核驗：否。
